dct_description_sm: This tabular data, prepared by Data You Can Use, presents rates of homeownership of Black households by census tract in the city of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. The data is sourced from the 2018-2022 American Community Survey 5-year estimates and utilizes 2020 Census tracts. For more information, please visit Data You Can Use.
schema_provider_s: American Geographical Society Library – UWM Libraries
